title: mirabilis nyctaginea var. albida
intro: Mirabilis nyctaginea var. albida, also known as white four o'clock, is a variety of the Mirabilis nyctaginea plant, a flowering plant native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Mirabilis nyctaginea var. albida include its potential to reduce fever, relieve pain and inflammation, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
